sentiment: Extreme Fear in equities and crypto. S&P 500 closing around 6,344-6,446 by Mar 30-31, stuck below 20-, 50-, and 200-day MAs with VIX near 29.2, reflecting persistent risk-off and stagflation worries driven by Iran/Hormuz supply shock and weak labour market signals.
fed_policy: Rates held at 3.5-3.75% (Mar 18). Dot plot: 1 cut in 2026, 1 in 2027. Oil-driven inflation keeps the Fed data-dependent and wary of easing too soon. PCE inflation forecast raised to 2.7%.
next_major_catalyst: OPEC+ Meeting (Apr 1), US ISM Manufacturing (Apr 1), US ISM Services (Apr 3), US Non-Farm Payrolls (Apr 4), JNJ Q1 Earnings (Apr 14), PEP Q1 Earnings (Apr 16), PG Q3 FY26 (Apr 24), KO Q1 Earnings (Apr 28).

strategy_adjustments.macro-volatility: Regime remains high-vol: VIX ~29, S&P below all key moving averages. USOIL long removed — stop at $89.50 was breached on Mar 25 (intraday low $86.72). Focus on the next 5-7 days of Tier-1 data (OPEC+, ISM Manufacturing/Services, NFP). Prefer post-data volatility breakouts over pre-positioning; avoid opening new macro-directional risk within 12h of any major print.
strategy_adjustments.earnings-momentum: March heavy-earnings week (CTAS, PAYX, CHWY, CCL) has passed; MU stop breached. Book now focuses on post-earnings gap follow-throughs (ACN) and defensive pre-earnings run-ups in April reporters (JNJ Apr 14, PEP Apr 16, PG Apr 24, KO Apr 28). All are large-cap defensives with strong beat histories. High-vol regime caps new entries at MODERATE/LOW conviction.
strategy_adjustments.post-shock: MDB and BNTX removed: MDB stop ($248) clearly breached with closes in the low-230s by Mar 30; BNTX aged past 1.5x holding window with unverifiable stop behaviour. Book retains DLTR (confirmed base above $98 stop) and GLD (stabilised ~$428-429 by Mar 31, TP raised to $465 to restore R:R to 1:1.6). Accept that post-crash is intentionally lean rather than fill with low-quality names.
strategy_adjustments.crypto: BTC closed ~$67.9K on Mar 31 after oscillating mid-60Ks to high-60Ks through late March. Regime: Extreme Fear. Treat BTC and ETH as primary vehicles; limit total crypto positions to a maximum of three and keep all altcoins at LOW conviction only. Entries should respect BTC $65K support zone and avoid overlapping with major macro prints (especially NFP Apr 4).
strategy_adjustments.pair-trades: XOM/UAL removed: UAL short stop (96.50) hit on Mar 23. LMT/CCL removed: LMT long stop ($608) breached with close $598.57 on Mar 30; CCL now ~$28.78 above $27 short stop. Book retains CVX/ALK, XOM/SPY, LLY/NVO, COST/WMT — all stops confirmed not hit. Manual chart check recommended for CVX/ALK to confirm no intraday spike below $194 immediately post-entry.

notes: Regime classification follows Trading Copilot thresholds: VIX >25 forces high volatility; S&P 500 trading below 20- and 50-day MAs plus continued geopolitical risk (Iran/Hormuz) confirms bearish skew. All prices re-verified as of Mar 31, 2026. USOIL, MDB, BNTX, XOM/UAL, LMT/CCL, MU, CTAS, PAYX, CHWY, CCL pre-earnings removed due to QG3 stop violations or lifecycle expiry.
